abilities.description: When you cast your next instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

effect.description: When you cast your next instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.
effect.name: DelayedTrigger

triggers.description: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a time counter on CARDNAME. Then if there are seven or more time counters on it, remove those counters and it deals 20 damage to you.
